name: §6T-Rex
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Strength: §c75
§7Crit Chance: §95%
§7Ferocity: §c[Ferocity]

§6Close Combat
§7Deal §a100% §7more §cdamage §7to enemies
§7within 1.5 blocks.

§6Ferocious Roar
§7Attacks have a §a10% §7chance to stun
§7the target §8(10s cooldown).

§6Tyrant
§7Combat stats granted by pet items on
§7this pet are increased by §a100%§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Fossil T-Rex Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aT-Rex§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
